value.value: The classic Neapolitan pizza with tomato sauce, mozzarella, and fresh basil.
Controversial but beloved: ham and pineapple on tomato sauce with mozzarella.
Four-cheese pizza: mozzarella, parmesan, gorgonzola, and fontina.
Classic cheeseless Neapolitan pizza with tomato, garlic, oregano, and olive oil.
A spicy pizza with salami and jalapeños.
Seafood pizza with shrimp, mussels, calamari, and clams.
Japanese-inspired pizza popular in Tokyo pizzerias.
